name: Rogz Dog Bubble Bowl 750ml - Pink Love Print (BOWL105-CK)
description: The Rogz Dog Bubble Bowl in a charming Pink Love Print is perfect for your furry friend! With a capacity of 750ml, this stylish bowl is designed for both functionality and flair. Its unique bubble shape adds a playful touch, while the durable, non-slip base ensures stability during mealtime. Made from high-quality materials, it’s easy to clean and resistant to wear. Treat your pet to a bowl that’s as lovely as they are! Rogz Bubble Bowl is a classic two-in-one design. A removable stainless steel inner bowl makes it easy to provide both food and water at the same time. 1. Top non-toxic stainless-steel bowl 2. Bottom striking design melamine bowl Made with a non-skid silicone base, this bowl is easy to clean and durable. UV and corrosion resistant make it a 100% non-harmful option for your pet. Available in various colours and 3 sizes Size and volume: Small 160ml
